title: GraphFact
description: A sanitized fact emitted by GAIL OS for ingestion into the Graphify CNS store via the extraction pipeline. GraphFacts flow from GAIL OS to Graphify through the extraction/write lane only — never through the Graphify HTTP API. GAIL OS canonical source.

GraphFactType.description: Classification of the graph fact being emitted.

GraphFactStatus.description: Lifecycle state of this graph fact in the extraction lane.

fact_id.description: Unique graph fact identifier. Must use the 'gfact-' prefix.

subject_entity_id.description: The primary entity this fact describes. Must be a stable entity ID from the GAIL OS or Graphify entity space.

object_entity_id.description: Optional secondary entity for relationship facts (e.g. the target of an action).

emitted_by.description: GAIL OS layer or module that emitted this fact.

emitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this fact was emitted by GAIL OS.

mission_id.description: Parent mission that produced this fact. Must use 'mission-' prefix when present.

action_id.description: Action that produced this fact. Must use 'action-' prefix when present.

evidence_id.description: Evidence packet associated with this fact. Must use 'evidence-' prefix when present.

source_ref_id.description: Source reference tracing back to the GAIL OS entity of record. Links to source-ref.schema.json. Must use 'src-' prefix when present.

graph_ref_id.description: Optional reference to an existing Graphify entity this fact updates or corroborates. Links to graph-context-ref.schema.json. Must use 'gref-' prefix when present.

sanitized_payload.description: Sanitized key-value data from the GAIL OS record. Must not contain secrets, credentials, or raw provider content. Graphify ingests this payload to update entity attributes or relationship weights.

ingestion_notes.description: Notes from the Graphify extraction pipeline on ingestion result (populated after ingestion, null when emitted or queued).
